text:
Once upon a time, in a sleepy village nestled between rolling hills, there lived a young girl named Ella. Ella was as energetic as a spring breeze and had a knack for finding trouble wherever she went. Her favorite pastime was wandering off into the forest, her heart racing at the thought of discovering its secrets.

One sunny morning, just as she had decided today would be the day she'd find the mythical Golden Frog, Ella spotted something unusual. Near the old oak tree she'd grown up near, there was a puddle that seemed to glow softly. Curious, Ella sat down by it and glanced closer. The water shimmered like liquid sunshine.

To her fascination, she noticed something shiny glinting across the surface—all by itself. A Golden Frog! Ella had seen stories about these animals, their eyes filled with mischief. But seeing one up close was impossible to believe. She reached out her hand, expecting it was just a stone.
